channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: A GPU or a CPU with 4TB HBM-class memory? Nope, you're not dreaming, Sandisk is working on such a monstrous product
item.description: Sandisk has unveiled High Bandwidth Flash (HBF) for AI workloads which will have a major impact on the $100 billion HBM market.
item.dc:creator: waynewilliams@onmail.com (Wayne Williams), TechRadar

item.title: Nvidia confirms 'rare issue' with some RTX 5090 and RTX 5070 Ti GPUs – here’s how to check if you’re affected and to get a replacement
item.description: The launch of Nvidia's new GPUs has gone badly enough already, but now there's a hardware-level glitch slowing down RTX 5090 and 5070 Ti GPUs.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Rich in cash, Japan automaker Toyota builds a city to test futuristic mobility
item.description: Woven City near Mount Fuji is where Japanese automaker Toyota plans to test everyday living with robotics, artificial intelligence and autonomous zero-emissions transportation.
item.dc:creator: Yuri Kageyama, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: The government or 4chan? The White House’s social media account is sparking outrage
item.description: The official White House social media account is under fire for posts that resemble something typically found on the internet forum 4chan. A post shared on February 14, styled like a Valentine’s card, read, “Roses are red, violets are blue, come here illegally and we’ll deport you.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Sweden is investigating a damaged cable in the Baltic Sea
item.description: STOCKHOLM (AP) — Swedish authorities said on Friday they were investigating a damaged cable that was discovered in the Baltic Sea, the latest in a string of recent incidents of ruptured undersea cables that have heightened fears of Russian sabotage and spying in the region.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Majority of Americans dislike Musk, Zuckerberg: Poll
item.description: A Pew Research Center poll shows 54% of Americans have an "unfavorable" view of Musk, while 67% have an "unfavorable" view of Zuckerberg.
item.dc:creator: Taylor Delandro, NewsNation

item.title: Apple drops encryption feature for UK users after government reportedly demanded backdoor access
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Apple said Friday it will stop offering an advanced data security option for British users after the government reportedly demanded that the company provide backdoor access for any data those users have stored in the cloud.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: A cheaper YouTube Premium Lite tier could roll out soon – and as a Spotify fan I'm ready to sign up
item.description: A new, cheaper YouTube Premium tier could launch soon, and it's perfect for those who just want videos and not YouTube Music.
item.dc:creator: rowan.davies@futurenet.com (Rowan Davies), TechRadar

item.title: Grok 3 model puts xAI at the top tier of frontier model developers
item.description: Welcome to AI Decoded, Fast Company’s weekly newsletter that breaks down the most important news in the world of AI. You can sign up to receive this newsletter every week here.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: Chaos ahead: emerging technologies will test data privacy, says Britain’s ICO
item.description: Emerging technologies such as connected transport, quantum sensing, healthcare diagnostics, and synthetic AI-driven content are creating huge gaps in data protection and privacy that could quickly outpace the ability of regulators and enterprises to contain them.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Everything we know about Apple’s C1 5G modem in iPhone 16e
item.description: There’s a lot to like about Apple’s newest $599 iPhone 16e, but one of the more interesting features in the device is the Apple-designed 5G modem. Apple has spent at least seven years developing the chip, but gave it just a few short seconds of time when it announced the smartphone this week.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Ex-OpenAI CTO Mira Murati launches AI startup, recruits top talent from rivals
item.description: Former OpenAI CTO Mira Murati has launched an AI startup, Thinking Machines Lab, escalating the fight for top talent and reshaping competition in the fast-evolving sector.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Humanoid robots bust dance moves alongside humans
item.description: Unitree H1 robots dance at gala, blending AI and tradition. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson examines the convergence of cutting-edge technology and traditional culture.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Generative AI vs. the software developer
item.description: If you aren’t aware of the tectonic shift that is generative artificial intelligence, then I can only assume your phone has been on Airplane mode for the last year. You can’t swing a laptop bag these days without knocking over four startups doing something with AI.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: DeepSeek accused of sharing user data with TikTok owner ByteDance
item.description: "We confirmed DeepSeek communicating with ByteDance," a South Korean data protection regulator told Yonhap News Agency.
item.dc:creator: Liz Jassin, NewsNation

item.title: SpaceX makes history after launching rocket from Florida and landing booster in Bahamas
item.description: For the first time ever, SpaceX launched a rocket into space from Florida and landed the booster the Bahamas, allowing for future polar-orbit spaceflight missions.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 2025 global network outage report and internet health check
item.description: The reliability of services delivered by ISPs, cloud providers and conferencing services is critical for enterprise organizations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: 3 reasons to consider a data security posture management platform
item.description: A week rarely goes by without a major data security breach. Recent news includes a breach impacting an energy company’s 8 million customers, another compromising the information on 450,000 current and former students, and one more exposing 240,000 credit union members.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: A top Chinese official tours Thai-Myanmar border to highlight crackdown on scam centers
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — Efforts to shut down online scam centers in Myanmar appeared to gain momentum on Monday as a top Chinese security official visited both sides of the Thai-Myanmar border ahead of expected large-scale repatriations of workers in the illicit industry.
item.dc:creator: JINTAMAS SAKSORNCHAI, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News
